description_long: This is a beaded necklace displayed on a black, matte-finished jewelry bust stand. The necklace features a series of round and cylindrical beads in a variety of earthy tones, including red, yellow, white, and black, with some beads displaying intricate patterns and alternating colors. The beads are strung together on a thin, dark cord that is visible at the back of the stand. The arrangement of the beads creates a visually balanced and symmetrical design, with larger, more ornate beads positioned at the center and smaller, simpler beads toward the ends. The jewelry bust itself is sleek and modern, providing a neutral backdrop that highlights the vibrant colors and textures of the necklace. This piece would be suitable for display in a boutique, gallery, or as a personal accessory in an urban setting.
description: A colorful beaded necklace with patterned and solid beads in red, yellow, white, and black, displayed on a sleek black jewelry bust. The necklace features a symmetrical arrangement and a visually striking design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full necklace with its colorful beads and symmetrical arrangement on the black bust.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bust and the curvature of the necklace as it drapes.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the thin cord of the necklace and the back of the bust, with no beads visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the necklace's drape and bead arrangement from another angle.
